rules.name: secrets-detected
rules.message: Possible hardcoded secret or API key in added code. Review for exposed credentials.

rules.name: sql-injection-risk
rules.message: Possible SQL injection via string interpolation. Use parameterized queries.

rules.name: eval-exec-usage
rules.message: Dynamic code execution (eval/Function) detected in added code. Review for injection risks.

rules.name: permission-changes
rules.message: Permission or access control files changed. Review authorization logic and edge cases.

rules.name: cors-csrf
rules.message: CORS or CSRF configuration changed. Review allowed origins and token handling.

rules.name: crypto-changes
rules.message: Cryptographic code changed. Review algorithm choices, key management, and side-channel risks.

rules.name: dependency-audit
rules.message: Dependency lockfile changed. Review new dependencies for known vulnerabilities.
